description_long: This is a human figure dressed in a fitted hooded top with a large chest cutout and long, dramatically extended sleeves that appear to stretch unnaturally outward. The figure is wearing tight pants and sturdy, lace-up boots, with the overall attire suggesting a modern, slightly fantastical or stylized urban look. The face is visible beneath the hood, and the hands are partially extended, with the arms and sleeves distorted in a way that gives an impression of motion or a digital glitch. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the boots reach above the ankles. The figure's posture is upright, with one leg slightly forward, and the arms and sleeves are the most visually striking feature due to their exaggerated length and stretching. The asset appears to be made primarily of materials simulating human skin, fabric, and synthetic footwear.
description: A hooded adult figure in tight, modern clothing with extremely elongated, stretched sleeves and sturdy boots, standing upright. The arms and sleeves are visually distorted, creating a dramatic, stylized effect.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest cutout, and the dramatic extension of both sleeves outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, the left arm's extreme stretch, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hood, the back of the legs, and the full extension of both sleeves.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right arm's stretch, the side of the hood, and the boots' profile.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted hooded top with chest cutout and extremely long sleeves, tight pants, and lace-up boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms and sleeves extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair partially covered by hood
